creator: yds@dppl.com
text:
--On Friday, November 23, 2001 20:48:04 -0600 "David W. Chapman Jr." 
<dwcjr@inethouston.net> wrote:

> How does the maintainer of this feel?

Hi David,

Honestly I don't know.  I can tell you the implications.  Any port whith a

LIB_DEPENDS+=     sablot.70:\${PORTSDIR}/textproc/sablotron

must bump up the lib version.  PR32232 I sent in for www/mod_php4 takes 
care of that among a few other things.  There are a number of other ports 
which will need adjusting.  Otherwise its a very minor version upgrade, 
nothing more.

-- 
Yarema
